project_name: Zero to Many: Scaling Post-Web Systems
simulation_requirement: Simulate the dynamics of new Post-Web-native systems being constituted from scratch using the 'Systems Not Startups' grammar, competing with traditional startups for the same problem stacks. Model solo AI-augmented founders (100x founders) constituting systems via stigmergic formation, with fluid contributors, conviction-based financing, and AI agents as both builders and users. Explore whether constitutional design quality predicts success better than execution speed, and how a proto-founder gig economy self-organises.
additional_context: Based on Path 2 'Constitute' from the Post-Web thesis by Outlier Ventures. The framework proposes that startups are replaced by 'systems' — constitutional designs that self-organise through stigmergic coordination. Token as constitutional enforcement. Equity is dead as coordination mechanism for distributed innovation. Conviction Markets replace venture capital for capital allocation.
